name: Chocolate-Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients and set aside.
2. With a mixer beat the butter and sugar until smooth. Add eggs and beat well.
3. With a spoon stir in vanilla, orange peel, and zucchini.
4. Alternately stir in the dry ingredients and the milk.
5. Add nuts at the last.
6. Pour into 10-inch tube pan and bake at 350 degrees for about 1 hour. May also be baked in small or medium loaf pans.
7. Drizzle with sugar glaze or sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired.
8. Freezes well.
